title: papaver pinnatifidum var. simonii
intro: Papaver pinnatifidum var. simonii is a variety of the Pinnatifid Poppy, a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
